[textmode.synth.js](../../../index.md) / [SynthSource](../../SynthSource.md) / mask

# Method: mask()

```ts
mask(source): this;
```

Mask using another source.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `source` | [`SynthParameterValue`](../../../type-aliases/SynthParameterValue.md) | Source to use as mask |

## Returns

`this`
